title: diphryllum micranthum
intro: Diphryllum micranthum, also known as the small-flowered diphryllum or small-flowered diphyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Diphryllum micranthum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
